summary: Backend modularization regression testing completed. All 25/26 backend API tests passed. The monolithic server.py has been successfully refactored into modular structure with separate routers, models, services, and utils. Frontend admin panel working correctly.

minor.issue: Route returns frontend HTML instead of XML when accessed at root level. The endpoint is defined at /sitemap.xml but Kubernetes ingress routes non-/api paths to frontend. Use /api/sitemap.xml or configure ingress.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend modularization is well-structured with clear separation of concerns
All routers properly imported and registered in server.py
JWT authentication working correctly across all protected endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend modularization complete and verified. All API endpoints working. Admin panel accessible at /tr/admin (language prefix required). 3 appointments exist in database. 48 users, 50 active listings, 13872 page views.

health_endpoints.GET /api: PASS - Returns API info with version 2.0.0

partner_endpoints.GET /api/partners: PASS - Returns partner list with pagination

frontend_admin_panel.Dashboard: PASS - Shows stats, pending profiles, quick actions, system status
frontend_admin_panel.Reports page: PASS - Shows revenue, views, users, appointments with charts
frontend_admin_panel.Appointments page: PASS - Shows appointment stats and table with 3 appointments
frontend_admin_panel.Menu structure: PASS - All 6 sections present (GENEL, KULLANICILAR, İLANLAR, İÇERİK, KATALOG, AYARLAR)

modular_structure_verified.server.py: Main entry point - imports and registers all routers
modular_structure_verified.routers/auth.py: Authentication routes - login, register, me, profile
modular_structure_verified.routers/partners.py: Partner profile routes - CRUD, images, favorites
modular_structure_verified.routers/admin.py: Admin routes - dashboard, users, profiles, appointments, reports
modular_structure_verified.utils/auth.py: JWT utilities - hash, verify, create_token, get_current_user
